shot.start: Scrap yard, daylight; a weathered male hand rests on a large dusty tractor tyre, dust hanging in the sunlight
shot.action: the hand pats the tyre once then grips its edge; a dust puff rises
shot.end: hand gripping the tyre edge, dust settling

scenes.negatives: no people entering, no camera cut, no zoom, no text

shot.start: RAJU standing alone in the scrap yard, one foot on the tyre, facing camera
shot.action: a slow chin raise into a faint half-smile
shot.end: eyes locked on camera, smile held

scenes.negatives: no one else enters, no camera cut, no text

shot.start: hands with a hammer at the mesh-fitted tyre rim; a finished trough behind with a buffalo drinking
shot.action: three steady hammer taps seating the mesh; the buffalo keeps drinking in the background
shot.end: hammer resting on the rim, buffalo still at the water
shot.camera: locked-off, a tiny drift right toward the buffalo in the last second

scenes.negatives: no faces, no camera cut, the buffalo does not leave, no text

shot.start: RAJU crouched by a row of finished naands on the village street, an older man static in the background
shot.action: one wiping stroke along the trough rim, then he looks up to camera
shot.end: gaze locked on camera, hand resting on the rim

scenes.negatives: background man stays put, no camera cut, no vehicles, no text

shot.start: night room, RAJU on a cot, face lit by phone glow, scrolling
shot.action: the scrolling quickens, then he stops and lowers the phone to his lap, exhaling
shot.end: phone on his lap, jaw tight, motionless in the glow

scenes.negatives: no lights turn on, no one enters, no screen content visible, no camera cut, no text
scenes.ambient: quiet room tone, a single cricket

shot.start: outdoor daylight, a hand holding a blank-white-screen phone filling the frame, people seated far behind in soft focus
shot.action: the thumb taps the blank screen once, then hovers
shot.end: thumb resting at the screen edge, phone steady

scenes.negatives: background people stay still, no interface or text on the screen, no camera cut

shot.start: the farmer pressing currency notes into RAJU's palm over the trough, cattle behind the fence
shot.action: the notes pass; RAJU's fist closes around them
shot.end: both men still, the trough between them, fist closed

scenes.negatives: no extra people, no camera cut, calm faces, no text

shot.start: market street; RAJU at the stacked naands with two buyers; his mother in a green saree at the doorway touching her earrings
shot.action: RAJU straightens, chin lifting toward camera; the mother touches her earring in the background
shot.end: proud stance frozen, buyers mid-conversation, mother smiling in the doorway

scenes.negatives: no crowd surge, no camera cut, the mother stays in the doorway, no text

shot.start: RAJU chest-up, arms crossed, market behind him, a slight smile at camera

scenes.negatives: no one approaches camera, no camera cut, no text

vo.speaker: RAJU
vo.line: ये फेंका हुआ टायर दिख रहा है? इसी में महीने के 60,000 छुपे हैं।

vo.speaker: RAJU
vo.line: लोग मुझे कबाड़ी बुलाते थे, कहते थे कचरा बेचके ज़िंदगी नहीं चलती... पर मैं चुप रहा।

vo.speaker: RAJU
vo.line: एक पुराना टायर सिर्फ़ 120 रुपये का आता है, और थोड़ी मेहनत के बाद वही नांद बनकर 600 से 1,000 में बिकता है।

vo.speaker: RAJU
vo.line: दिन के पाँच बनाओ तो महीने के डेढ़ सौ हो जाते हैं — और ज़रूरत हर गाँव, हर बाड़े में है। हिसाब ख़ुद जोड़ लो।

vo.speaker: RAJU
vo.line: सोचा काम बढ़ाऊँ, पर समझ नहीं आया कैसे। यूट्यूब खोला... और वहीं ग़लती हो गयी — ना प्रोसेस समझ आया, ना मंडी का रास्ता।

vo.speaker: RAJU
vo.line: फिर सीखो ऐप मिला। बिज़नेस आइडियाज़ कैटेगरी में A टू Z सिखाया — माल कहाँ से लेना, बनाना कैसे, बेचना कहाँ। कोई बड़ी बातें नहीं, शुरुआत सिर्फ़ 1 रुपये के ट्रायल से।

vo.speaker: RAJU
vo.line: वो मेरी पहली कमाई थी — पूरे 600 रुपये, अपने ख़ुद के काम के।

vo.speaker: RAJU
vo.line: आज मंडी में मेरी अपनी जगह है और महीने के 70 हज़ार बनते हैं। माँ के लिए पहली बार गहने लिए... और अब लोग कबाड़ी नहीं, कारीगर बोलते हैं।

vo.speaker: RAJU
vo.line: ज़िंदगी भर नौकरी थोड़ी करनी है... तो इंस्टॉल बटन पर क्लिक करो और सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो।

text.text: Ye phenka hua tyre dikh raha hai?
Isi mein mahine ke ₹60,000 chhupe hain
Log mujhe kabaadi bulate the...
par main chup raha

thodi mehnat ke baad wahi naand ₹600-1,000 mein bikta hai

zaroorat har gaon, har baade mein hai
Hisaab khud jod lo
Socha kaam badhaun... par kaise?

na process samajh aaya, na mandi ka raasta

ab log kabaadi nahi... KAARIGAR bolte hain
